name: All the Dead Gods
additional_info: Whenever you land a Basic Attack, the target has most healing forms reduced/disabled for 8 seconds. Your anti-heal potency scales on your Willpower + Intelligence investment, only having 100% anti-heal if your Intelligence and Willpower attributes add up to at least 105.
desc: Your Basic Attacks now apply anti-heal and 5% Heal Boost against PvE for 8s.
